docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFFS DECLARATION REGARDING SMALL CLAIMS CASE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY NARRAWAY, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT ELVEBAKK, RANVEIG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($70.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED MAY-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELVEBAKK, RANVEIG
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2011 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FILED BY DEFENDANT ELVEBAKK, RANVEIG
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NARRAWAY, ANDREW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELVEBAKK, RANVEIG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEFENDANTS REQUEST TO DISMISS CLAIM-REQUEST FORWARDED TO JUDGE MITCHELL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY NARRAWAY, ANDREW ELVEBAKK, RANVEIG
